text:
Once upon a time in the mystical forest of Eldoria, there lived a young Qwen named Lila. Lila was not like other young Qwens; she had the ability to understand and communicate with all the creatures of the forest. She would often sit under the ancient oak tree, listening to the secrets shared by the wind, the rustling leaves, and the chirping birds.

One sunny morning, as Lila was tending to her garden of magical flowers that only bloomed for those pure of heart, she noticed something peculiar—a tiny, injured butterfly flitting weakly among the petals. Lila approached gently, her soft touch causing the butterfly to calm down. She knew that if she didn't help, the butterfly might not survive.

Lila carried the butterfly to her house made of fallen branches and leaves, where she tended to its wounds. She used herbs from her garden, which were known to heal any ailment, and sang soft songs to help it feel better.
